description_long: This house features a modern, single-story layout with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, complemented by large rectangular windows arranged in a regular pattern. The property is surrounded by manicured hedges and includes a central courtyard with a small pool, a patio area with outdoor seating, and a variety of trees and shrubs. A trellis-covered walkway and a green privacy wall add to the landscaping, while the main entrance is defined by a minimalist pathway and a cluster of tall, slender trees. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and seamless integration between indoor and outdoor living. The house is likely constructed from concrete, glass, and metal, with extensive use of greenery for both privacy and aesthetic appeal.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped courtyard featuring a pool and patio. Surrounded by hedges and trees, the design blends indoor and outdoor spaces with clean lines and minimalist details.
description_view_0: This view highlights the central courtyard with a pool, the main patio area, and the trellis-covered walkway on the right, framed by tall trees and dense hedges.
description_view_1: From this angle, the grid-patterned pathway and the main entrance area are visible, along with the lush greenery and outdoor seating near the pool.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the rear of the house, the flat roof structure, and the arrangement of windows, as well as the open courtyard and surrounding landscaping.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the symmetrical window arrangement, the enclosed courtyard with a pool, and the extensive use of hedges for privacy.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entry with a straight pathway, no porch, and flanked by tall, slender trees; simple door with no decorative overhang.
